qualifying.headline: Russell Claims Pole at Melbourne

incidents.description: Traffic in final sector cost Verstappen in Q1, eliminated at P16

qualifying.notes: Russell takes pole with 1:18.518, Antonelli qualifies P2

keyMoments.description: Safety car after Stroll spins at Turn 6
Norris overtakes Leclerc for P3 with DRS

practice.fp2: Rain-affected session, limited running. Russell quickest in dry conditions
practice.fp3: Red flag after Tsunoda hydraulics failure at Turn 13. Recovered with 10 mins remaining
